project.description: The name of the Angular project to configure.

mode.description: Installation mode: quick uses defaults, custom asks each option.

x-prompt.message: How do you want to configure ngx-theme-stack?

items.label: Quick  – use default settings (theme: system, mode: class, storageKey: ngx-theme-stack-theme)

theme.description: Default theme to apply on startup.

x-prompt.message: Which default theme should be applied on startup?

storageKey.description: localStorage key used to persist the selected theme.
storageKey.x-prompt: What localStorage key should be used to persist the theme? (default: ngx-theme-stack-theme)

themeMode.description: Strategy used to apply the theme to the <html> element.

x-prompt.message: How should the theme be applied to the <html> element?

items.label: both       – apply class AND attribute simultaneously
